lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

OutputPermanentControlList.comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

OutputTemporaryControlList.comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

lists.0: Request for availibility LID from 0 to 19
lists.32: Request for availibility LID from 21 to 39

DiagnosticIdentificationCode.comment: Fixed value (identifies a break in the ECU diag definition)

LastAfterSalesOperationDate.Day.comment: Day of Last after sales operation date (BCD coding)

LastAfterSalesOperationDate.Month.comment: Month of Last after sales operation date (BCD coding)

LastAfterSalesOperationDate.Year.comment: Year of Last after sales operation date (BCD coding)

ECU Config.Antenna phantom PS.comment: AM/FM antenna phantom power supply configuration

ECU Config.SWRC type.comment: Steering Wheel Remote Control Type configuration

ECU Config.DR Phantom PS.comment: Digital radio antenna phantom power supply configuration

UI Config.Restriction.comment: Feature restriction while driving (car is moving)

SWRC_button.LOW_Pressed.comment: SWRC "Low" button pressed since last clear

SWRC_button.HIGH_Pressed.comment: SWRC "High" button pressed since last clear

SWRC_button.SUP_Pressed.comment: SWRC "Sup" button pressed since last clear

SWRC_button.VOL_minus_Pressed.comment: SWRC "Volume -" button pressed since last clear

SWRC_button.VOL_plus_Pressed.comment: SWRC "Volume +" button pressed since last clear

SWRC_button.DOWNtoUP_Pressed.comment: SWRC Rotary Down to Up (ACBA type) since last clear

SWRC_button.UPtoDOWN_Pressed.comment: SWRC Rotary Up to Down (ABCA type) since last clear

SWRC_button.DOWNtoUP.comment: SWRC Rotary has moved down to Up (ACBA type) within last 2 seconds

SWRC_button.UPtoDOWN.comment: SWRC Rotary has moved up to down (ABCA type) within last 2 seconds

PartNumber.comment: Renault reference part number written in ASCII

lists.0: Test completed OK : default not present
lists.16: Default not yet checked by the ECU
lists.40: Default detected, confirmed but not more present

SoftwareNumber.comment: Identifies the software version active in the ECU

SWRC_button.phone&mute_Pressed.comment: SWRC "phone&mute" button of type2 pressed since last clear

SWRC_button.phone&mute.comment: SWRC "phone&mute" button of type2 is currently pressed

EditionNumber.comment: Identifies the software version (edition) active in the ECU

HardwareNumber.LowerPart.comment: Identifies the hardware version of the ECU

lists.0: No possible classification about the type of fault
lists.20: Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
lists.21: Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

ECU Config2.SWRC2 type.comment: Steering Wheel Remote Control 2 Type configuration

Parameters for AM/FM tuner.FieldMean.comment: antenna field Mean [dBµV], average value since start of the ECU

Parameters for AM/FM tuner.FieldMin.comment: antenna field Min [dBµV], minimum value since start of the ECU

Routinestatus.comment: Read the status of the routine

lists.1: Wifi 2.4 GHz supported and wifi 5 GHz is disabled
lists.2: Wifi 5 GHz is supported and 2.4 GHz is disabled

lists.0: No dynamic lines, No fixed lines

lists.4: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear
